analysis: V2 skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 test cases (31/31 assertions passed).
The biggest improvement is in the partial-setup scenario: V1 scored 80% (missed npm/pnpm detection and context acknowledgment), V2 scores 100%.
Step 0 diagnostic is working as designed: all 3 transcripts start with 4 parallel diagnostic checks.
npm vs pnpm mismatch: now explicitly detected and explained kindly ('No worries, this is a common mix-up!').
The confused-newcomer transcript includes 6 branching scenarios (A-F) showing the skill handles diverse states intelligently.
Minor cost: V2 uses slightly more tokens (~730 more avg) and takes ~9s longer due to diagnostic step. Acceptable tradeoff for 100% accuracy.
Remaining gaps noted by agents: no explicit 'rm -rf node_modules' before pnpm reinstall, no check for package-lock.json cleanup. These are minor and unlikely to cause real issues.
